summary: Excellent matrix mix captures a top‑form July 12 1990 show highlighted by a scorching Foolish Heart → Dark Star jam and strong first‑set work.
review: The recording is a well‑balanced matrix blend that preserves the crisp soundboard while patching the brief dropout on The Weight with audience audio. Musically the band is described as being at the top of their game, especially the PreSpace sequence (Take a Step Back, Hot Box, Victim and a fiery Foolish Heart → Dark Star). Fans also note this as Brent Mydland’s last great show.

ai_rating.rationale: Three detailed, highly positive reviews (average 4.7 stars) praise both the performance and the matrix recording; minor issue with The Weight does not detract from overall excellence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Soundboard is crisp; only a brief cut‑out at the end of The Weight, which is seamlessly covered by the audience patch in the matrix. Overall very listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong first set and post‑space, with an especially memorable PreSpace jam that drives the energy into the second set.

band_member_comments.Keys: Praised as 'the last great show with Brent,' highlighting his keyboard contributions.
